pi_items.source: Task description and iDempiere Payment Term standard naming convention
Task description and iDempiere Payment Term standard naming format
iDempiere C_PaymentTerm.Discount field documentation, consistent with 2-10-Net-45 notation
iDempiere C_PaymentTerm.DiscountDays field documentation, consistent with 2-10-Net-45 notation
iDempiere C_PaymentTerm.NetDays field documentation, consistent with 2-10-Net-45 notation

privileged_info_summary: Task configures a standard payment term '2-10-Net-45' in iDempiere with: Search Key '2-10-Net-45', Name '2% 10 Net 45', Discount 2%, Discount Days 10, and Net Days 45. All values are consistent with standard payment term notation (2% discount if paid within 10 days, full payment due in 45 days) and verified against iDempiere Payment Term database schema (C_PaymentTerm table columns: Value, Name, Discount, DiscountDays, NetDays, IsValid). The task requires clicking the Validate button to set IsValid field to 'Y'. Data is synthetic (GardenWorld demo environment).
